notes: Default MIDI device setup for the host rig: a RayDAT keyboard (merged with an MC8 footswitch) into Pianoteq, with the model output on the virtual 'Aria' port. control_cc toggles context-fill <-> generation; reset_cc starts a fresh piece (both ignored by Pianoteq, in the 102-119 'undefined' range). The GUI pre-selects midi_in/midi_out from this file; override per-run via the run-script env vars (MIDI_IN/MIDI_OUT/CONTROL_DEVICE/CONTROL_CC/RESET_CC) or by picking different devices in the browser.
